subject: Add Forge dashboard tab to RKOJ workstation
question: Can RKOJ add a 'Forge' tab next to Launcher / Devices / Plans that surfaces (a) live Forge sessions (spawned via forge.bridge on :5078), (b) cross-agent inbox for sinister-forge slug, (c) mermaid diagrams rendered via the new mermaid_render.py wrapper (R8)? Three sections, single tab, lightweight read-only.
context: Forge bridge is already live on :5078 (commit 1e5817a + 243db88) with REST + SSE endpoints. R8 mermaid wrapper ships with this same commit. R7 was the original cross-agent ASK in the Forge forward-plan and the only outstanding sibling-coupling row before R12. RKOJ owns workstation UI per rkoj-workstation-ui-layout brain entry — design tradeoffs (3-row header + 2-tab) are yours to honor.
